01 · The Brief

An e-commerce brand that needed someone to actually own the digital experience.

I joined Proline Range Hoods in early 2025 as a Content Manager focused on SEO. By mid-year my role was redefined: AI automation, analytics, and UX/UI design were going un-owned, and the company needed one person to drive those projects from idea through deployment — and to manage the external SEO agencies they'd just brought on. I now lead Marketing Operations and Digital Experience end-to-end — strategy, hands-on build, measurement.

" The promotion came because there was a gap in the company that these things weren't being done — AI automations, analytics, and UX/UI design oversight. There wasn't one person in charge of those projects, getting things changed and shipped.
02 · Strategy & Organic Growth

The team was writing about coffee grinding on a domain that sells range hoods.

Pre-2025, Proline ranked for ~150K keywords and pulled ~150K monthly organic visits — most on topics that had nothing to do with range hoods. High traffic, weak revenue conversion. I championed and executed the strategic pivot: prune the off-niche content, double down on buyer-intent terms. We deliberately walked away from ~90% of our keyword footprint. What replaced it actually sold range hoods.

2.5% → 24.20%
Visibility, Jan '25 → May '26
54 → 12.6
Avg. Search Position
7
Keywords Now Ranked #1
$899,686
2025 Organic Revenue
  • Co-led with two external SEO agencies — ThinkShaw (on-site SEO and broader strategy) and ABC Plus (44 backlinks in 2025). Owned the relationship, the content, and the on-page execution; they owned what they're best at.
  • Personally produced 120+ blogs, restructured the internal-linking system, ran the Screaming-Frog technical audit, and built the conversion tools that capture buyer intent at the bottom of the funnel.
  • Beat therangehoodstore (-6.02), Home Depot (-16.11), and Amazon (-3.84) in 2025 net visibility movement; outperformed every major competitor in the set.
  • Q1 2026 momentum: visibility climbed another 2 points (22.21% → 24.20%), avg. position improved from 23 → 12.6, top-3 keywords grew from 23 → 26. Specific Q1 climbs: "30-inch range hood" +95 positions to #5, "48-inch range hood" +91 to #9.
Stack SEMrush · GSC · GA4 · Shopify · Screaming Frog Partners ThinkShaw · ABC Plus Period Jan 2025 — Present
03 · AI Search Visibility

Most marketers are panicking about AI search. I have receipts.

Search isn't just Google anymore. I added AI search visibility as a discipline at Proline in 2025 — submitted the product feed directly to OpenAI and aligned our niche-keyword strategy with how LLMs answer product questions. Result, as of May 2026: 626 brand mentions across the four major AI surfaces.

Google AI Overview
338
brand mentions
Google AI Mode
197
brand mentions
ChatGPT
60
brand mentions
Gemini
31
brand mentions
  • +20.24% positive AI visibility impact on tracked keywords vs −10.95% negative impact — net positive on AI surface presence.
  • Top AI-visible terms mirror our niche strategy: 30-inch insert range hood, 48-inch outdoor island range hood, 36-inch outdoor wall range hood — all ranked #1.
  • Submitted the Proline product feed directly to OpenAI to position the catalog for AI-native shopping queries.
Source SEMrush AI Brand Presence Period Reporting May 2026
04 · AI Customer Experience

An AI agent on the storefront that closes leads while we sleep.

I selected, integrated, and configured the Tidio Lyro AI agent on the Shopify storefront. In its first 90 days it handled the majority of incoming customer questions and assisted on a quarter-million dollars in sales — measurable lift to the customer-service team and the conversion funnel.

$257K

Leads Acquired
  • Trained the agent on Proline's full product catalog, FAQ, return policy, and ducting/CFM rules.
  • Built conversational flows for the most common pre-purchase questions (sizing, ducted vs ductless, outdoor-rated).
Stack Tidio · Lyro · Shopify Period Feb 2026 — Present
05 · Internal AI Tooling

A second AI agent — this one for the people answering the phone.

Built a Slack-integrated AI agent for the Customer Service team, trained on Proline's full product specs, install manuals, and SKU history. Designed to accelerate onboarding for new CS hires and eliminate the constant "what's the CFM on the PLJW 185 again?" lookup loop.

"I use the agent often. It has been helpful, taught me, and improved my work experience."

— Proline Customer Service team member
Stack Slack · OpenAI · Custom Knowledge Base Status Live, in active daily use
06 · Custom Analytics

I built our Google Ads attribution dashboard. From scratch. It's already saving us thousands.

Before this dashboard, leadership couldn't see — by day, by month, or by campaign — how much of our Shopify revenue was actually attributable to paid search. I built a full attribution stack that pulls live order data, annotates it with GCLID, and renders the picture for the CEO, CFO, and external paid-media partner.

$1.005M
GCLID Revenue Tracked YTD
$4.67M
Total Revenue Visible
15.7%
Attribution Rate
1.38×
Google Ads ROAS
  • Integrated GCLID tracking site-wide so every Google Ads click writes attribution data into Shopify order notes.
  • Custom Vercel-hosted dashboard with monthly, daily, and per-channel views (Shopify Live, Google Ads Live, Bing, Connexity, Meta).
  • Drives weekly paid-media decisions with the external ads partner; gives the CFO a real revenue/spend reconciliation.
  • Currently expanding into a full CFO data hub — replacing manual ad-spend reconciliation, single-source-of-truth on revenue across all channels. Target: live in Q3 2026.
Stack Vercel · Shopify Order API · Google Ads API · GCLID Status Live Q1 2026 · Expanding
07 · First-Party Tools

Three calculators that do the selling for us.

Range hoods are bought once a decade — most shoppers don't know what size, what CFM, or what mounting type they need. I built three interactive tools that answer those questions and pull customers into the right product collection at the same time.

Tool 01

Insert Size Calculator

Cabinet opening width in → required insert size out (with the 2-inch clearance buffer applied). Embedded in the "How To Measure For An Insert Range Hood" blog and the Tools page.

Tool 02

CFM Calculator

Recommends CFM based on cooktop type, BTU output, and kitchen volume. The single most-asked customer-service question, now self-service.

Tool 03 · the breakout

Range Hood Quiz

5 questions, 3 matched Proline models with direct product links. 228 page-views, 16 starts, 14 completions in 28 days — an 87.5% completion rate, ~14 leads/month from organic.

Build Custom HTML/JS, embedded into Shopify theme Page /pages/proline-range-hood-tools
08 · Content & Brand

120+ blogs, all the newsletters, the Buyer's Guide.

Wrote, designed, scheduled, and published every monthly newsletter and the Black Friday flow. Authored the Proline Buyer's Guide — a 7-page PDF distributed to influencer partners as a sales-enablement tool while the on-site version is rebuilt.

09 · UX & Web Build

Shipping pages, not just speccing them.

With no in-house front-end engineer, I write and deploy the Shopify theme changes myself — coordinating with our backend partner only when something requires deeper integration.

About Us page

Designed and coded for SEO and brand storytelling. Live at /pages/about-us.

Photo Contest page

Custom-coded gallery + entry flow. Live at /pages/proline-photo-contest.

FAQ optimization

Reorganized for SEO + navigation; reduced repeat customer-service tickets and now serves as the knowledge base for the Tidio AI agent.

Black Stainless Steel collection page

New collection page targeting the growing finish category, built to compete in the ZLINE / KitchenAid space.

Tools page

Hub for the three calculators; designed and built end-to-end at /pages/proline-range-hood-tools.

Control Panel + Install Manuals

CS-driven page revisions to reduce post-purchase support volume.
